stations.name: San Jose US Embassy, Costa Rica
Delmas MP, South Africa; Delmas MP, Nkangala, South Africa

health_advisories.generalAdvisory: Air quality is satisfactory, and air pollution poses little or no risk.
health_advisories.sensitiveAdvisory: It is a perfect day for outdoor activities for everyone.
health_advisories.actionTip: Keep doing your part to keep the air clean! Use public transport, walk or cycle.

health_advisories.generalAdvisory: Air quality is acceptable. However, there may be a risk for some people, particularly those who are unusually sensitive to air pollution.
health_advisories.sensitiveAdvisory: Sensitive children and adults should limit prolonged outdoor exertion.
health_advisories.actionTip: Reduce driving, avoid burning leaves, and maintain your vehicle to prevent emissions.

health_advisories.generalAdvisory: Members of sensitive groups may experience health effects. The general public is less likely to be affected.
health_advisories.sensitiveAdvisory: Children, active adults, and people with respiratory disease should limit outdoor exertion.
health_advisories.actionTip: Conserve energy at home, and choose clean transportation options today.

health_advisories.generalAdvisory: Everyone may begin to experience health effects; members of sensitive groups may experience more serious health effects.
health_advisories.sensitiveAdvisory: Children and elderly should avoid outdoor physical activity; others should avoid prolonged outdoor exposure.
health_advisories.actionTip: Avoid wood burning, use air purifiers indoors, and wear a N95 mask if heading outdoors.

health_advisories.generalAdvisory: Health alert: The risk of health effects is increased for everyone. Emergency conditions are likely.
health_advisories.sensitiveAdvisory: Everyone should avoid all outdoor physical activity. Keep windows closed and run air filters.
health_advisories.actionTip: Work from home if possible, avoid any physical activity outdoors, and avoid starting any outdoor fires.

newState.Name: San Jose US Embassy, Costa Rica
Delmas MP, South Africa; Delmas MP, Nkangala, South Africa

environmental_tips.tipText: The average person breathes about 11,000 liters of air per day. Protect your lungs!
environmental_tips.author: AirPulse Team

environmental_tips.tipText: Did you know? Indoor air quality can be 2 to 5 times worse than outdoor air. Cultivate air-filtering indoor plants.
environmental_tips.author: CleanAir council

environmental_tips.tipText: Commuting by foot or cycling once a week reduces your transport emissions by up to 20%.
environmental_tips.author: GreenLife

environmental_tips.tipText: Planting trees in urban corridors helps block fine dust particles and reduces ambient summer heat.
environmental_tips.author: CityForest

environmental_tips.tipText: Avoid burning dry organic waste. Open fires release high-toxicity PM2.5 particles directly into breathing zones.
environmental_tips.author: EcoAlliance

location_interactions.location: San Jose US Embassy, Costa Rica
